data.title: OSAKA SODA Announces Stock Split and Dividend Forecast Revision
data.description:
OSAKA SODA CO.,LTD. (JP:4046) has released an update.

OSAKA SODA CO.,LTD. has announced a stock split to improve investment accessibility and share liquidity, with no change to stated capital. The stock split will increase the number of issued shares fivefold, with a revised year-end dividend forecast that reflects the split but maintains the original value. Amendments to the Articles of Incorporation will also increase the total number of authorized shares to 300 million.

For further insights into JP:4046 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Tertiary Minerals Shares Latest Corporate Update
data.description:
Tertiary Minerals (GB:TYM) has released an update.

Tertiary Minerals PLC has announced an interview with their Executive Chairman, Patrick Cheetham, now accessible via Total Market Solutions, providing insights into the company’s latest developments. Additionally, an updated corporate presentation is available for investors on the Tertiary Minerals website, offering a current overview of the company’s status and prospects.

data.title: K2fly Readies Shareholders for Acquisition Vote
data.description:
K2fly Limited (AU:K2F) has released an update.

K2fly Limited has dispatched the Scheme Booklet to its shareholders in preparation for the upcoming Scheme Meeting, where a vote will take place on the proposed acquisition of K2fly by Argyle Bidco Pty Ltd. Shareholders are advised to consult the booklet and accompanying materials for detailed information on the acquisition, valued at $0.19 per share, and are encouraged to seek professional advice if necessary. The Scheme Meeting is scheduled for 11:00 am AWST on 9 September 2024, with eligibility to vote determined by shareholder status as of 7 September 2024.

For further insights into AU:K2F stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Miquel y Costas Executes Share Buyback
data.description:
Miquel y Costas and Miquel (ES:MCM) has released an update.

Miquel y Costas & Miquel, S.A. has reported the execution of its Share Buyback Program, where a total of 2,499 shares were purchased from August 6 to August 8, 2024, at a weighted average price of €12.01. The company’s transactions were conducted on the XMAD trading center with individual purchase prices ranging from €10.85 to €12.65. This move is part of the company’s strategic financial activities as previously communicated on November 30, 2023.

For further insights into ES:MCM stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cosmo Energy Posts Strong First Quarter Gains
data.description:
Cosmo Energy Holdings Co., Ltd. (JP:5021) has released an update.

Cosmo Energy Holdings Co., Ltd. reported a robust first quarter for FY2024, with a significant increase in net sales by 7.6% and a surge in operating profit by 537.2% compared to the same quarter of the previous year. The company also noted an impressive rise in ordinary profit by 433.5%, while profit attributable to owners of the parent jumped to 24,697 million yen. These strong financial results are reflective of the company’s positive performance and strategic initiatives during the period.

For further insights into JP:5021 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: OTE Chairman Buys Shares Worth €145K
data.description:
Hellenic Telecom Organization SA (HLTOY) has released an update.

In a confident display of commitment to his company, Mr. Nebis Konstantinos, Chairman and CEO of Hellenic Telecommunications Organization S.A. (OTE), has purchased 10,000 shares of OTE at an average price of €14.5942, totaling a significant investment of €145,941.90. This strategic move, disclosed in a recent regulatory announcement, highlights insider confidence in the firm’s prospects and financial health.

data.title: UT Group Announces Mixed Q1 FY2025 Financials
data.description:
UT Group Co.,Ltd. (JP:2146) has released an update.

UT Group Co., Ltd. reports a 7.1% increase in sales but a decline in EBITDA and operating profit in the first quarter of FY2025 compared to the previous year, while profits attributable to owners jumped significantly by 152.1%. The company’s financial position remains stable with a slight decrease in the equity ratio from 40.0% to 39.4%. No dividends were paid in the first quarter, but a plan for a total yearly dividend of 164.81 yen per share has been announced, reflecting a 60% payout ratio.

For further insights into JP:2146 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Oizumi Corporation’s Impressive Quarterly Growth
data.description:
Oizumi Corporation (JP:6428) has released an update.

Oizumi Corporation reports a significant increase in quarterly operating results, with net sales rising to 5,743 million yen, up by 5.8%, and operating profit surging by 150.3% to 602 million yen. The company’s profit attributable to owners saw a notable rise of 720.9%, reaching 584 million yen. Despite a slight decrease in total assets, Oizumi’s capital adequacy ratio improved to 45.0%, indicating a stronger financial position.

For further insights into JP:6428 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Gakkyusha Co. Reports Mixed Quarterly Results
data.description:
Gakkyusha Co., Ltd. (JP:9769) has released an update.

Gakkyusha Co., Ltd., a Tokyo-listed company, has reported a slight increase in net sales to 2,526 million yen for the three months ended June 30, 2024, but saw declines in operating profit, ordinary profit, and profit attributable to owners of the parent. The company’s consolidated financial position shows total assets of 9,578 million yen and net assets of 6,011 million yen as of June 30, 2024. Despite the mixed results, the company forecasts a 5% increase in net sales and an 8.3% increase in profit attributable to owners for the full fiscal year.

For further insights into JP:9769 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Odakyu Electric Targets Share Buyback to Boost Value
data.description:
Odakyu Electric Railway Co (JP:9007) has released an update.

Odakyu Electric Railway Co., Ltd. plans to buy back up to 18 million shares, representing approximately 5% of its outstanding stock, for a total cost of up to 20 billion yen. This decision aligns with the company’s goal to maintain a consolidated total return ratio of 40% between FY2023 and FY2026, while also aiming to enhance shareholder value and improve capital efficiency. The share buyback, running from August 13, 2024, to March 31, 2025, will be executed through market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

For further insights into JP:9007 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
